title: [BUG] Windows Edge browser Promise finally undefined when import exceljs package
author: lidianhao123
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report Lib version: 4.2.0 Microsoft Edge: 44.18362.449.0 Microsoft EdgeHTML: 18.18362 ## Steps To Reproduce ```javascript import React from "react"; import "./styles.css"; import ExcelJs from "exceljs/dist/exceljs"; console.log(Promise.prototype.finally); // print undefined export default function App() { return (

https://codesandbox.io/s/exceljs-finally-bug-9yclv

Start editing to see some magic happen!

); } ``` when run above code in Edge browser, will show undefined full code can see [codesandbox exceljs-finally-bug-9yclv](https://codesandbox.io/s/exceljs-finally-bug-9yclv) you can download the code and run `yarn start`, then visit localhost:3000 in Edge browser. ## The expected behaviour: Promise finally can be correctly after import exceljs package

comments.author: thetilliwilli
comments.body: same issue in Internet Explorer Version 21H1 (OS Build 19043.1466)
